---
pagetitle: "Manuela Arenas Ocampo"
---

::: {.hero}
<img src="profile.jpg" class="avatar" width="128" height="128" style="border-radius:50%;border:4px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(10,79,92,.25);" />

::: {.hero-name}
Manuela Arenas Ocampo
:::

::: {.hero-tag}
Biological Engineering Student · Marine & Coral Reef Research
:::

[✉ Email](mailto:elusuario@unal.edu.co){.pill}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/USERNAME){.pill}
[GitHub](https://github.com/USERNAME){.pill}
[CV (PDF)](cv.pdf){.pill}
:::

I'm an undergraduate Biological Engineering student at the **Universidad Nacional de Colombia**,
drawn to the ocean — and to how marine and [coral reef]{.accent} ecosystems work and persist
under environmental change. My work brings together **molecular** (population genetics &
bioinformatics), **computational** (oceanographic modeling with CROCO), and **field-based**
approaches as a certified diver.

## Research

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.r-card}
### Coral Reef Ecology & Oceanography
[OCEANICOS · 2025–Present]{.tag}

Relationship between oceanographic processes and coral reef community ecology in Barú
(Colombian Caribbean), using the CROCO ocean model. Poster at SENALMAR 2026.
:::

::: {.r-card}
### Population Genetics
[Explorers of Genetic Diversity · 2024–Present]{.tag}

Taxonomic identification of a freshwater fish (*Hypostomus* sp.) — species delimitation,
phylogenetic systematics & bioinformatics. Poster at the Colombian Congress of Ichthyology 2026.
:::
:::

See more on the [Research](research.qmd) and [Projects](projects.qmd) pages.
